nodes.name: 斑石鸻
nodes.summary: The spotted thick-knee (Burhinus capensis), also known as the spotted dikkop or Cape thick-knee, is a wader in the family Burhinidae. It is native to tropical regions of central and southern Africa. Description The spotted thick-knee, which can reach up to 45.5 cm (17.9 in) in height, has long legs and brown-and-white speckled plumage which provides camouflage, making it difficult to spot the bird in the grasslands and savannas where it roams. Its head is large and round with a prominent yellow eye and a short, stout beak. When in flight or standing in a characteristic position with its wings raised, it shows a striking contrasting pattern. Its legs are long and yellow and the tibiotarsal joint is expanded, giving it the name "thick-knee". Behaviour The spotted thick-knee is nocturnal and squats on the ground during the daytime, making it difficult to spot. It hunts exclusively on the ground, feeding on insects, small mammals and lizards. Breeding It nests on the ground, lining a scrape with grasses, feathers, pebbles and twigs. The female typically lays two eggs, and males and females rear the offspring together, with both bringing food back to the nest. The birds will defend the nest and adopt a defensive pose with wings spread and tail cocked and will even peck an intruder. Sometimes they will fake injuries to lead predators away from the nest. Distribution The spotted thick-knee is native to the grasslands and savannas of sub-Saharan Africa. Its range extends from Senegal, Mali and Mauritania in the west to Ethiopia, Kenya, Tanzania and South Africa in the east and south respectively, as well as in south Yemen in West Asia. Status The spotted thick-knee has a very extensive range, and its population is believed to be stable. For these reasons, the IUCN has rated it as being of "Least Concern". Gallery References External links BirdLife species factsheet for Burhinus capensis "Burhinus capensis". Avibase. "Spotted dikkop media". Internet Bird Collection. Spotted thick-knee photo gallery at VIREO (Drexel University) Interactive range map of Burhinus capensis at IUCN Red List Audio recordings of Spotted thick-knee on Xeno-canto. Spotted thick-knee Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds Spotted thick-knee Structured guide to the species in southern Africa

nodes.name: 斑石鸻
nodes.summary: 斑石鸻（Burhinus capensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如斑石鸻。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 石鸻科
nodes.summary: 石鸻科（Burhinidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如秘魯石鴴、雙紋石鴴、澳洲石鸻等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: 石鸻属
nodes.summary: 石鸻属（Burhinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如秘魯石鴴、雙紋石鴴、长尾石鸻等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。
